articles.title: Ultrahuman says hackers accessed customers’ wellness data via internal tool
articles.description: The breach at wearable ring maker Ultrahuman stemmed from credentials stolen from a malware-infected employee laptop.

articles.title: Carvana ties up with Bezos-backed Slate Auto as it plans new car sales
articles.description: Carvana was granted a warrant to buy shares in Slate last year, according to documents obtained by TechCrunch. Guggenheim Partners CEO Mark Walter is heavily invested in both companies.

articles.title: Instagram is alerting users who were targeted by hackers during AI chatbot attacks
articles.description: Hackers appeared to take over victims’ accounts even after Meta said it fixed its AI-powered support chatbot, which granted hackers access to victims’ accounts.

articles.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
articles.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

articles.title: Still facing copyright lawsuits, AI music generator Suno raises another $400M
articles.description: The prominent AI music-generation startup is now valued at over $5.4 billion -- about seven months ago, it raised at a $2.45 billion valuation.

articles.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
articles.description: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

articles.title: GitLab cuts 14% of staff as it scales its platform to serve AI workloads
articles.description: The company is reducing its workforce as it exits 22 countries, reduces management layers, and invests in its infrastructure to scale its platform.

articles.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
articles.description: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

articles.title: TikTok launches TikTok Pro Events, an app for cultural moments like the FIFA World Cup
articles.description: The app allows users to engage with other fans, explore trending videos, and access curated creator feeds.

articles.title: The worst hacks and breaches of 2026 (so far)
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Meet Wander, a StumbleUpon-inspired tool for discovering the ‘small web’
articles.description: This open source community project lets you create a StumbleUpon-like experience for recommending your favorite sites.

articles.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
articles.description: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

articles.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
articles.description: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.

articles.title: Plex adds new social features ahead of a major price hike for its lifetime pass
articles.description: The company said it's worked up a moderation system that uses a blend of AI and human input to moderate both visual and written content.

articles.title: The world’s largest privately owned laser just turned on
articles.description: Fusion startup Xcimer fired up the world's largest privately owned laser.

articles.title: Squishmallows, dentures, and an ‘I Heart Hot Dads’ bag: Uber has found thousands of items left in robotaxis
articles.description: Even in a future of robot taxis, someone still has to return the things passengers leave behind.

articles.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
articles.description: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

articles.title: Cyberdecks are having a moment, rejecting big tech surveillance with style and substance
articles.description: Over the last few months, these DIY hardware communities have exploded in popularity as people on social media show off their solar-powered game emulators, pocket-sized ereaders, and clamshell purse computers.

articles.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
articles.description: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

articles.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
articles.description: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

articles.title: Beans use an immune receptor to call in airstrikes on caterpillars
articles.description: When they're being eaten, bean plants release chemicals that draw in parasitic wasps.

articles.title: How long will it take to rebuild Blue Origin's launch pad? We asked some SpaceX vets.
articles.description: "Everyone is in a place where it’s no fun to be there."

articles.title: Male bowerbirds prefer to dazzle females with bright human-made items
articles.description: "It’s a reminder of how human activity is changing the natural world in unanticipated ways.”

articles.description: One hardware announcement and several software highlights from Microsoft Build.

articles.title: Microsoft's Project Solara is an Android OS designed for agents instead of apps
articles.description: Microsoft missed the boat on apps, so get ready for agents.

articles.title: Amazon-owned Ring should pay Americans for scanning their faces, lawsuit says
articles.description: Lawsuit: Ring cameras scan guests and passersby and use AI to identify faces.

articles.title: If I had a hammer... it might actually be a rhino tooth
articles.description: Neanderthals had some wild stuff in their toolkits.

articles.title: Feds failing in bid to take a supercomputer from a climate research center
articles.description: The National Center for Atmospheric Research won't be losing its supercomputer.

articles.title: Mathematicians warn of AI threats to profession as industry encroaches
articles.description: International Mathematical Union endorses warning about tech industry influence.

articles.title: Android phones will soon be able to detect spoofed calls and impersonation scams
articles.description: Google's June Android feature drop includes more scam detection, more AirDrop, and yes, more AI.

articles.title: The truth lies in the past in Silo S3 trailer
articles.description: "We do not know when it will be safe to go outside. We only know that day is not this day."

articles.title: Number of suspected Ebola cases falls by hundreds as testing ramps up
articles.description: The number of cases falls from 1,100 to 437 with increased testing.

articles.title: Why a Neo Geo port of Doom is functionally impossible
articles.description: Sprite-based graphics architecture makes first-person 3D a challenge.

articles.title: In a surprise launch, China debuts another big rocket designed for reusability
articles.description: There are sound engineering reasons to use the same approach SpaceX uses with the Falcon 9.

articles.title: Blue Origin has set a very aggressive return-to-flight timeline
articles.description: "The propellant farm, oxygen, liquid hydrogen, and LNG tanks are all in good shape."

articles.title: Slate Auto gets serious about privacy for its bare-bones EV pickup
articles.description: With no embedded modem, the Slate Truck is the antithesis of today's connected cars.

articles.title: Trump's DOE restarts energy rebate program with dumb conditions
articles.description: Switching from fossil fuels to electricity for heating is no longer covered.

articles.title: Impulse Space raises $500 million as orbital maneuvering race heats up
articles.description: "The market's going to continue to find exciting new things."

articles.title: AI costs how much? GitHub Copilot users react to new usage-based pricing system.
articles.description: Some report burning through their whole monthly "AI credit" allotment in a single day.

articles.title: Why cats prefer silver vine to catnip and other May highlights
articles.description: Prehistoric mining in the Pyrenees, a new species of tiny blue octopus, slapstick acoustics, and more.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **数据安全与隐私**：Ultrahuman因内部工具漏洞导致用户健康数据泄露；Instagram正主动通知在AI聊天机器人攻击中遭黑客针对的用户；新规允许出版商选择退出AI搜索，以保护内容权益。
2. **AI应用与商业扩张**：亚马逊在搜索结果中展示AI生成的产品图片；Meta的AI助手已全球上线WhatsApp Business；TikTok推出“TikTok Pro Events”应用，聚焦世界杯等文化时刻；AI音乐生成器Suno在面临版权诉讼下仍获4亿美元融资。
3. **企业战略调整**：GitLab裁员14%以聚焦AI工作负载；Carvana与贝佐斯支持的Slate Auto合作，计划拓展新车销售；Plex在终身会员大幅涨价前新增社交功能。
4. **新兴技术与投资**：两位前高盛和Meta员工创立语音AI公司，瞄准被忽视的市场；Coralogix获2亿美元融资，专注监控AI代理；全球最大私有激光器已启动运行。
5. **黑客与安全事件回顾**：2026年（迄今）最严重的黑客与数据泄露事件被盘点。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI应用正加速渗透至搜索、音乐、社交、客服等各领域，但随之而来的数据泄露、版权诉讼与安全监控问题也愈发突出，行业正面临技术创新与风险管控的双重考验。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与物理AI进展**：NVIDIA发布首个开源全模态模型Cosmos 3，用于物理AI推理与行动；Holo3.1推出快速本地化计算机使用代理，提升交互效率。
2. **模型与工具创新**：JetBrains推出12B参数的混合专家模型Mellum2；Hugging Face展示了超越聊天机器人的直接偏好优化（DPO）技术，以及将MCP工具集成至Reachy Mini机器人。
3. **企业级AI与代理逻辑**：强调可扩展的企业AI采用依赖于代理逻辑，而非单纯的大语言模型；PyTorch发布profiler入门指南，助力性能优化。
4. **Google AI应用与生态**：Google I/O 2026发布Gemini Omni与Gemini 3.5的9个演示、AI原型实验室项目，以及利用Gemini构建大会的幕后故事；同时推出复古购物搜索优化、AI编写互动测验等实用功能。
5. **AI治理与政策**：OpenAI发布公共政策议程及前沿AI民主治理蓝图，探讨技术发展的社会规范与监管框架。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：NVIDIA开源物理AI全模态模型Cosmos 3，标志着AI从语言对话向物理世界推理与行动的关键跨越。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国航天取得新突破**：中国成功发射新型可重复使用火箭（如长征十二号乙），并首次发射与SpaceX“猎鹰9号”竞争的火箭，同时完成“千帆”卫星部署任务，展现航天技术的快速进步。
2. **科技与产业领域持续发力**：中国科学家在脑机接口、实验室培育钻石（受益于AI热潮）等领域取得进展，同时警方扩大智能眼镜应用，推动社会治理与产业创新。
3. **国际科技竞争与制裁应对**：美国扩大对华AI芯片出口禁令范围至中国境外企业，欧盟拟加入“Pax Silica”芯片联盟以对抗中国AI发展，凸显中国在芯片与AI领域的战略博弈。
4. **民生与社会治理改善**：中国正低调改善农民工生活条件，并推进金门融合蓝图，体现区域发展与民生保障的并行推进。
5. **药物研发与汽车产业挑战**：中国药物研发崛起引发美国关注，同时美国拟禁止中国高科技汽车，但相关产品已流入得州埃尔帕索，反映中美产业竞争加剧。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国航天在可重复使用火箭领域的连续突破，以及国际社会对中国AI芯片和汽车产业的遏制行动，标志着中国科技发展已进入全球竞争深水区。
